title: STM32 code - kinematics
STM32 code - kinematics
STM32 code - kinematics
STM32 code - kinematics
text:
Appendix: Values of Parameters

Ackerman Car (当前车型：顶配独立悬挂阿克曼)
#if defined AKM_CAR
    //阿克曼小车拥有的车型数量
    #define CAR_NUMBER    10    
    //Wheel_spacing //轮距
    #define   SENIOR_AKM_wheelspacing  0.322f //高配阿克曼
    #define   TOP_AKM_BS_wheelspacing  0.508f //顶配摆式悬挂阿克曼
    #define   TOP_AKM_DL_wheelspacing  0.585f //顶配独立悬挂阿克曼
    
    //Axle_spacing //轴距
    #define   SENIOR_AKM_axlespacing   0.322f //高配阿克曼
    #define   TOP_AKM_BS_axlespacing   0.590f //顶配摆式悬挂阿克曼
    #define   TOP_AKM_DL_axlespacing   0.530f //顶配独立悬挂阿克曼
    
    //Diameter of trolley tire
    //小车轮胎直径
    #define   SENIOR_AKM_WheelDiameter  0.125 //高配阿克曼
    #define   TOP_AKM_BS_WheelDiameter  0.180 //顶配摆式悬挂阿克曼
    #define   TOP_AKM_DL_WheelDiameter  0.254 //顶配独立悬挂阿克曼

    //The minimum turning radius of different Ackermann models is determined by the mechanical structure:
    //the maximum Angle of the wheelbase, wheelbase and front wheel
    //不同阿克曼车型的最小转弯半径，由机械结构决定：轮距、轴距、前轮最大转角
    #define   SENIOR_AKM_MIN_TURN_RADIUS  0.750f //高配阿克曼
    #define   TOP_AKM_BS_MIN_TURN_RADIUS  1.400f //顶配摆式悬挂阿克曼
    #define   TOP_AKM_DL_MIN_TURN_RADIUS  1.200f //顶配独立悬挂阿克曼


4WD Car (当前车型：高配摆式)
#elif defined _4WD_CAR
    //四驱小车的车型数量
    #define CAR_NUMBER    13    
    //half wheelspacing //半轮距
    #define SENIOR_4WD_BS_wheelspacing   0.176 //高配摆式常规、重载
    #define SENIOR_4WD_DL_wheelspacing   0.230 //高配独立常规
    #define TOP_4WD_BS_wheelspacing      0.311 //顶配摆式常规、重载
    #define TOP_4WD_DL_wheelspacing      0.295 //顶配独立常规、重载
    #define FlagShip_4WD_BS_wheelspacing 0.286 //旗舰摆式常规、重载
    #define FlagShip_4WD_DL_wheelspacing 0.24  //旗舰独立常规、重载

    //half axlespacing //半轴距
    #define SENIOR_4WD_BS_axlespacing   0.150 //高配摆式常规、重载
    #define SENIOR_4WD_DL_axlespacing   0.20  //高配独立常规
    #define TOP_4WD_BS_axlespacing      0.308 //顶配摆式常规、重载
    #define TOP_4WD_DL_axlespacing      0.201 //顶配独立常规、重载
    #define FlagShip_4WD_BS_axlespacing 0.167 //旗舰摆式常规、重载
    #define FlagShip_4WD_DL_axlespacing 0.14  //旗舰独立常规、重载

    //4WD wheel tire diameter series
    //四驱车轮胎直径
    #define  WheelDiameter_4WD_152  0.152f //高配
    #define  WheelDiameter_4WD_225  0.225f //顶配 & 旗舰
    #define  WheelDiameter_4WD_250  0.250f
Notice that the wheel spacing and axle spacing for 4WD cars are half values, \(\frac{W}{2}\) and \(\frac{L}{2}\).
